description: Total US university R&D FY2024 = sum across all source categories in agg_national_overview
sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(amount_nominal) AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_national_overview.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2024

description: Federal source R&D FY2024
sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(amount_nominal) AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_national_overview.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 AND source_category = 'federal'

description: Institutional funds FY2024 (second-largest source)
sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(amount_nominal) AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_national_overview.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 AND source_category = 'institutional'

description: Nonprofit source R&D FY2024 (~$6.7B)
sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(amount_nominal) AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_national_overview.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 AND source_category = 'nonprofit'

description: Industry source R&D FY2024 (~$6.4B)
sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(amount_nominal) AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_national_overview.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 AND source_category = 'industry'

description: State + local government source R&D FY2024 (~$6.1B)
sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(amount_nominal) AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_national_overview.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 AND source_category = 'state'

description: Federal share of total R&D FY2024 (~55%)
sql: WITH t AS (SELECT source_category, SUM(amount_nominal) AS amt FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_national_overview.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY source_category) SELECT (SELECT amt FROM t WHERE source_category = 'federal') / (SELECT SUM(amt) FROM t)

description: HHS (incl. NIH) share of federal R&D FY2023 (~58% per agg_uni_agency_split)
sql: WITH t AS (SELECT agency_bucket, SUM(amount_nominal) AS amt FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_agency_split.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2023 GROUP BY agency_bucket) SELECT (SELECT amt FROM t WHERE agency_bucket = 'HHS') / (SELECT SUM(amt) FROM t)

description: HHS federal R&D FY2023 national total (~$28B)
sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(amount_nominal) AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_agency_split.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2023 AND agency_bucket = 'HHS'

description: NSF federal R&D FY2023 national total (~$7B)
sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(amount_nominal) AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_agency_split.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2023 AND agency_bucket = 'NSF'

description: DOD federal R&D FY2023 national total (~$5.7B)
sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(amount_nominal) AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_agency_split.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2023 AND agency_bucket = 'DOD'

description: DOE federal R&D FY2023 national total (~$2.1B)
sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(amount_nominal) AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_agency_split.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2023 AND agency_bucket = 'DOE'

description: NASA federal R&D FY2023 national total (~$1.9B)
sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(amount_nominal) AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_agency_split.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2023 AND agency_bucket = 'NASA'

description: USDA federal R&D FY2023 national total (~$2.1B)
sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(amount_nominal) AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_agency_split.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2023 AND agency_bucket = 'USDA'

description: Johns Hopkins total R&D FY2024 ~$4.1B — #1 in US
sql: SELECT CAST(t.total_rd_nominal AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_total_rd.parquet') t JOIN read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/dim_institution.parquet') i USING (institution_sk) WHERE i.canonical_name = 'Johns Hopkins University' AND t.fiscal_year = 2024

description: University of Michigan, Ann Arbor total R&D FY2024 (~$2.1B)
sql: SELECT CAST(t.total_rd_nominal AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_total_rd.parquet') t JOIN read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/dim_institution.parquet') i USING (institution_sk) WHERE i.canonical_name = 'University of Michigan, Ann Arbor' AND t.fiscal_year = 2024

description: Stanford University total R&D FY2024 (~$1.6B)
sql: SELECT CAST(t.total_rd_nominal AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_total_rd.parquet') t JOIN read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/dim_institution.parquet') i USING (institution_sk) WHERE i.canonical_name = 'Stanford University' AND t.fiscal_year = 2024

description: Harvard University total R&D FY2024 (~$1.5B)
sql: SELECT CAST(t.total_rd_nominal AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_total_rd.parquet') t JOIN read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/dim_institution.parquet') i USING (institution_sk) WHERE i.canonical_name = 'Harvard University' AND t.fiscal_year = 2024

description: MIT total R&D FY2024 (~$1.07B)
sql: SELECT CAST(t.total_rd_nominal AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_total_rd.parquet') t JOIN read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/dim_institution.parquet') i USING (institution_sk) WHERE i.canonical_name = 'Massachusetts Institute of Technology' AND t.fiscal_year = 2024

description: ARDES era (pre-FY2010) reports zero nonprofit dollars — landmine #2
sql: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT CAST(SUM(amount_nominal) AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_source_split.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2008 AND source_category = 'nonprofit'), 0)

description: FY2010 (first post-ARDES year) has nonprofit dollars — ~$3.7B
sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(amount_nominal) AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_source_split.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2010 AND source_category = 'nonprofit'

description: PI count national FY2024 from agg_uni_pi_metrics (top-20K NIH+NSF floor) — should be > 500
sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(pi_count) AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_pi_metrics.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2024

description: HHI sanity FY2023 — at least one institution highly concentrated (>4000)
sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_concentration.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2023 AND hhi > 4000

description: HHI sanity FY2023 — many institutions diversified (<2500)
sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_concentration.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2023 AND hhi < 2500

description: STEM share of HERD R&D FY2024 (~93%)
sql: WITH t AS (SELECT SUM(amount_nominal) FILTER (WHERE is_stem) AS stem, SUM(amount_nominal) AS total FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_field_mix.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2024) SELECT stem / total FROM t

description: Vol70→71 boundary (FY2014→FY2015) growth — total US R&D should grow not crash
sql: WITH y AS (SELECT fiscal_year, SUM(amount_nominal) AS amt FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_national_overview.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year IN (2014, 2015) GROUP BY fiscal_year) SELECT (SELECT amt FROM y WHERE fiscal_year = 2015) / (SELECT amt FROM y WHERE fiscal_year = 2014)

description: Johns Hopkins federal share of own R&D FY2024 (~88%, defense-heavy)
sql: WITH h AS (SELECT institution_sk FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/dim_institution.parquet') WHERE canonical_name = 'Johns Hopkins University') SELECT (SELECT herd_federal_rd_usd_nominal FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/sheet_07_cross_source_reconciliation.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year=2024 AND institution_sk IN (SELECT institution_sk FROM h)) / (SELECT total_rd_nominal FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_total_rd.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year=2024 AND institution_sk IN (SELECT institution_sk FROM h))

description: Sheet 11 federal-university-bridge: HERD-reported FY2024 universities expenditure (~$64.7B)
sql: SELECT CAST(herd_reported_universities_expenditures_usd AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/sheet_11_federal_university_bridge.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2024

description: Sheet 11 FY2024 gap FF_explicit − HERD is negative post-FY2018 (~-$20B)
sql: SELECT CAST(gap_ff_explicit_minus_herd_usd AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/sheet_11_federal_university_bridge.parquet') WHERE fiscal_year = 2024

description: HERD institution count in dim_institution observed by agg_uni_total_rd (~1014)
sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT institution_sk) AS DOUBLE) FROM read_parquet('apps/web/public/data/agg_uni_total_rd.parquet')
